title: OpenAI
html:
OpenAI

AI research lab — makers of ChatGPT, the GPT model family, and the OpenAI API that quietly underwrites two of Yahir's shipped products. Across the corpus OpenAI shows up in three modes: (1) opinion-formation target (Yahir tracks the open-source-vs-closed debate), (2) API as build infrastructure (BroMenu / Brotein camera + scoring, Rankett visibility audits), and (3) provider chip in the AI visibility lineup (always shown next to Anthropic and Google in Rankett UI).

Chronology

  • 2023-03-29 — Spring-break self-brief (2023 03 29 plans for spring break) explicitly lists "form an opinion on AI opensource, regarding OpenAI" as a deliberate intention. First vault evidence Yahir is tracking the open-vs-closed AI debate.
  • 2024-05-13 — In the May/June 2024 OSU finals dump an OpenAI announcement lands as "monumental" — opening line of the bridge doc between OSU-student Yahir and China-traveler Yahir.
  • 2024-12-21 — BroMenu spec explicitly architects the product on OpenAI Camera API for OCR + GPT API for anabolic scoring. OpenAI is the AI brain of Brotein.
  • 2025-07-10 — Brotein Secrets.xcconfig shows OPENAI_API_KEY hardcoded — flagged for de-hardcoding the same week (the roadmap tabs screenshot puts "DeHardcoding API Keys" + "Safe APIKEYS" at the top).
  • 2026-01 → 2026-02 — Rankett ships v2.6 with the OpenAI / Anthropic / Google provider trio always rendered together (liftatx audit, v2.6 fresh deploy). OpenAI is the canonical first provider in the lineup.
  • 2026-03-13 — competitor diligence frames OpenAI specifically as the limited-visibility surface (the "API answer" that diverges from the actual user-facing scrape) — the architectural question that defines Rankett's moat.
